summary: Implemented FreshBooks API integration across three layers: (1) created server/services/freshBooksApi.js with a FreshBooksApi class that validates env config, sets a request timeout, and provides detailed error logging for network vs. API-level failures; (2) created server/controllers/financeController.js with getInvoices (delegates to the service) and a stub getOverview for the dashboard; (3) created server/routes/financeRoutes.js wiring GET /invoices and GET /overview to the controller; (4) created config/env.example with placeholders for all required environment variables including FRESHBOOKS_API_URL and FRESHBOOKS_API_TOKEN.
